# Astronomical Twilight

[Back to all zmanim](index.md)

## End Astronomical Twilight

The end of astronomical twilight.

Calculated using a zenith of 108°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getEndAstronomicalTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getEndAstronomicalTwilight`

## End Civil Twilight

The end of [civil twilight](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Twilight#Civil_twilight).

Calculated using a zenith of 96°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getEndCivilTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getEndCivilTwilight`

## End Nautical Twilight

The end of nautical twilight.

Calculated using a zenith of 102°.

This time may not be available if the calculation cannot be computed.

??? info "Technical details"
    Source method: `AstronomicalCalendar.getEndNauticalTwilight`

    Technical reference: `com.kosherjava.zmanim.AstronomicalCalendar.getEndNauticalTwilight`
